name: Bio Spinomon
description: Digimon Analyzer ⇨ Japanese Bio Spinomon A Bio-Hybrid that is the fusion of human and Digimon. Its Special Move is Blue Prominence . A blast of blue fire that will burn everything! — Digimon Savers: "The Fierce Attack of Kurata's Army Corps, Protect the Holy Capital" Digimon Savers ⇨ English バイオスピノモン 人間とデジモンが融合したバイオハイブリッド体だ。必殺技は ブループロミネンス 。一兆度の火の玉で全てを焼き尽くすぞ。 — デジモンセイバーズ 「猛攻倉田軍団 聖なる都を守れ」 デジモンセイバーズ ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ Japanese He is said to be "ten times faster, a hundred times more powerful, and infinitely more in love with Honey ( Yoshino )" than Bio Stegomon in his Ultimate form. In addition to his physical abilities, he is also equipped with a powerful flame technique called " Blue Prominence " that he exhales from his mouth. Digimon Series Memorial Book: Digimon Animation Chronicle ⇨ English バイオステゴモンに比べて「スピードは１０倍、パワーは１００倍、ハニー（淑乃）への愛は無限大」になったと言われる究極体の姿。肉体能力もさることながら、口から吐く「ブループロミネンス」といった強力な火炎技も備えている。 デジモンシリーズ メモリアルブック デジモンアニメーションクロニクル ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K
